lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant engine issues, a damaged transmission, and noticeable rust on the exterior panels. The interior shows heavy wear and tear, and several electronic components are non-functional.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a solid choice for someone looking for reliable transportation on a budget. The exterior shows its age with some noticeable scratches, a few small dings, and some fading on the clear coat. Inside, the upholstery has some staining and the driver's seat shows significant wear, though all major electronics and the air conditioning still function properly. Mechanically, the car runs and drives, but it does have high mileage and a slow oil leak that will eventually need attention. It has been regularly maintained with oil changes, but expect to invest in some minor repairs and tires in the near future. It’s a dependable workhorse that isn't perfect but still has life left in it.
This car is in mint condition.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine, showroom condition. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, reflects a history of meticulous care and preservation. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically beyond reproach, this offering is intended for the individual who demands uncompromising quality and investment-grade condition.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total showroom stunner! This car is in truly mint condition—honestly, it still feels and smells brand new. I’ve kept it garaged, pampered, and meticulously detailed since day one, so you won't find a single blemish. It drives like an absolute dream and is just waiting for someone who will love it as much as I have. Come see it for yourself; you definitely won't be disappointed!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, presenting in showroom condition. Under the rear decklid sits a meticulously maintained 3.6L flat-six featuring VarioCam Plus, delivering a linear torque curve and 315 hp through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is equipped with the M030 sport suspension for sharpened turn-in and reduced body roll. Critical preventative maintenance is complete, including a dual-row IMS bearing retrofit and a documented bore-scope inspection. The braking system features four-piston monoblock calipers with ventilated rotors, showing zero heat cycling. With flawless paint depth and a pristine undercarriage, this is a turn-key, collector-grade example for the discerning purist.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included. Showroom condition.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, preserved in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on clear, sunny days. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with professional ceramic coating; there are absolutely no stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory-fresh scent, with the premium leather upholstery remaining supple and free of any bolster wear or creasing. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the haptic touch controls, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, reflecting the low mileage and meticulous care this vehicle has received. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom car cover. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, which stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains its original deep-gloss finish, while the cabin remains in pristine, factory-original condition. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure that its mechanical performance aligns with its flawless aesthetic. For the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade vehicle that offers an uncompromising driving experience, this offering represents an unrivaled opportunity.

Hey there! 🚗✨ I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been pampered its whole life, garage-kept, and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! If you’re looking for a ride that feels and smells brand new, this is the one. It drives like an absolute dream and has been treated with so much love. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to help you get behind the wheel of this beauty!

Offering a concours-level 987.2 Cayman S, featuring the coveted 3.4L Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) flat-six power plant. This mid-engine masterpiece delivers 320hp through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle, ensuring optimal gear-spacing and driver engagement. The chassis is equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), providing a lowered center of gravity and adaptive damping for neutral cornering kinematics. This example is mechanically flawless, with zero bore scoring evidence and a documented service history. The factory finish remains pristine with consistent paint meter readings across all panels, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster compression or switchgear delamination. A definitive turn-key example for the purist seeking peak analog feedback.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Inspection welcome.
